data.title: Trump’s tariffs spare no nation while Bessent urges trading partners against retaliation
data.description:
President Donald Trump has moved ahead with a new set of sweeping tariffs, prompting Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent to urge foreign governments against hitting back with retaliatory measures. Bessent, speaking Wednesday to Bloomberg Television, said, “I wouldn’t try to retaliate. As long as you don’t retaliate this is the high end of the number. ” His […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trumps-tariffs-spare-no-nation-while-bessent-urges-trading-partners-against-retaliation/

data.title: As Bitcoin dominance rises, are altcoins choosing to carve their own path?
data.description:
Soon, altcoins may stop riding BTC's coattails.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/as-bitcoin-dominance-rises-are-altcoins-choosing-to-carve-their-own-path/

data.title: FDUSD has completed the first redemption and maintained 1:1 full support
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to First Digital officials, in the face of recent market FUD, FDUSD has completed the first batch of redemption requests, and the corresponding destruction transactions can be viewed on the chain. 
The official reiterated that FDUSD still maintains 1:1 full support, the redemption channel runs smoothly, and all redemption applications will continue to be processed in a timely manner.

data.title: Bitget has issued monthly salary rewards for channels in March, with a maximum monthly reward of $65,000
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget announced that it has completed the distribution of the March rewards for the channel monthly salary plan. This is the third time this year that the monthly salary plan rewards have been distributed, covering all eligible Chinese-speaking channel partners.
As an important part of Bitget's long-term channel incentive policy, the monthly salary plan does not require manual registration, and all Chinese-speaking channels participate by default. In addition to the regular monthly rebate, partners who meet the incentive rules can receive an additional monthly reward of up to 65,000 USDT.
Bitget will continue to use diversified incentive mechanisms to give back to the long-term trust and support of ecological partners, work together to promote user growth and ecological construction, and achieve win-win cooperation and sustainable development.

data.title: LBank has launched penguin tariff (PT)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBank has launched penguin tariff (PT) at 11:50 (SGT) on April 3, 2025, and opened PT/USDT trading pairs. At present, the deposit service is open, and the withdrawal service will be open at 12:00 on April 4, 2025.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net outflow of $51.2447 million yesterday, and none of the nine ETFs had a net inflow
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (April 2, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Ethereum spot ETFs was 51.2447 million US dollars.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Grayscale ETF ETHE, with a single-day net outflow of 31.0783 million US dollars. Currently, ETHE's total net outflow has reached 4.198 billion US dollars.
The second is BlackRock ETF ETHA, with a single-day net outflow of 20.1664 million US dollars. Currently, ETHA's total net inflow has reached 4.053 billion US dollars.

As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETF is 6.489 billion US dollars, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Ethereum) is 2.86%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached 2.36 billion US dollars.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETF had a total net inflow of US$221 million yesterday, turning into a net inflow after three consecutive days of outflow
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (April 2, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$221 million.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Ark Invest and 21Shares' ETF ARKB, with a net inflow of US$130 million in a single day. Currently, ARKB's total net inflow has reached US$2.652 billion.
The second is Fidelity Bitcoin ETF FBTC, with a net inflow of US$119 million in a single day. Currently, FBTC's total net inflow has reached US$11.503 billion.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was BlackRock's Bitcoin ETF IBIT, with a net outflow of US$116 million in a single day. Currently, IBIT's total net inflow has reached US$39.845 billion.

As of press time, the total net asset value of the Bitcoin spot ETF is US$97.354 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Bitcoin) is 5.73%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$36.237 billion.

data.title: OnlyFans Founder's Startup And HBAR Foundation Enter Race To Acquire Tiktok To Maintain 'American Ownership And Governance'
data.description:
Tim Stokely, the founder of OnlyFans, and a cryptocurrency foundation have joined forces to place a late-stage bid for the acquisition of TikTok’s U. S. operations from ByteDance. 
source: https://www.benzinga.com/markets/cryptocurrency/25/04/44620779/onlyfans-founders-startup-and-hbar-foundation-enter-the-race-to-acquire-tiktok-us-to-maintain-american-ownership-and-governance?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: DDoS attacks now a dominant means of waging political cyber-warfare
data.description:
Distributed denial-of-service (DDoS) attacks are outpacing many traditional cyber threats and are no longer just a tool but a “dominant geopolitical weapon,” according to network security firm Netscout. Global DDoS activity increased by 12. 7% in the second half of 2024 compared to the first half, totaling almost 9 million attacks, according to the firm.  A DDoS attack is a malicious attempt to disrupt the normal web traffic of a targeted server, service, or network by overwhelming the target or its surrounding infrastructure with a flood of internet traffic
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ddo-s-attacks-dominant-means-waging-political-cyber-warfare-netscout?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Ethereum Price Recovery Stalls—Bears Keep Price Below $2K
data.description:
Ethereum price attempted a recovery wave above the $1,880 level but failed. ETH is now trimming all gains and remains below the $1,880 resistance zone. Ethereum failed to stay above the $1,850 and $1,880 levels. The price is trading below $1,850 and the 100-hourly Simple Moving Average
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/eth/ethereum-price-recovery-stalls-2k/
